title: helichrysum madagascariense
intro: Helichrysum madagascariense, also known as the 'Swazi Gold' or 'Swazi Tea', is a flowering plant species of the daisy family, Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used in South African and Swazi folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of volatile oils, particularly alpha-pinene and beta-pinene. The health benefits of Helichrysum madagascariense include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and improve respiratory health, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of digestive issues and skin conditions. Helichrysum madagascariense is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be consumed or applied topically to reap its benefits.
